blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Verify that the system sends notifications to users for re-signing waivers when terms are updated.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of notifying active climbers to re-sign the waiver when terms are updated. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the system's capability to notify users or enforce re-signing upon updates to the waiver terms. The linked use case mentions this requirement but lacks concrete evidence of its implementation, indicating a gap in the requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of system notifying active climbers to re-sign when terms are updated.

deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system sends notifications to users for re-signing waivers when terms are updated.
